subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast been favored by God with great love from 'Abdu'l-Bahá, thy spiritual letter hath been received, and that which thou didst request [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من وفقه الله بحب عظیم من عبدالبهاء نامه روحانی واصل و آنچه خواسته بودید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @universal peace; world unity, @symbolism
